visualization and the `FLOW/` directory (layer descriptions, Polish, in the source project) —
the setup detector is its own level **L6**. Technical contract: `docs/SPEC.md`. Decision
register + changelog: `docs/PIPELINE_REVIEW_CONFIGURABLES.md` (both in the source project).
- **S&P 500 universe** — the set of **503 tickers** of the S&P 500 index; the list is pinned in `config/universe.txt`.
- **Asset** — any instrument with OHLCV data; the pipeline is independent of price scale and timeframe (spec §1).
- **TF (timeframe)** — candle resolution; default `1h` (parameter spec §7).

- **Parameters** — the only place for configuration = `config/params.json` (contract spec §7); zero thresholds hardcoded in the code. The most important: `TF`, `H=24`, `MIN_TOUCHES=2`, `W_ATR=14`, `W_VOL=20`, `ATR_VARIANT=wilder`, `PRICE_VIEW=raw_usd_view`, `T
- **volume required** — for this universe, missing volume = hard fail QC (spec §2).
- **ET-naive → UTC tz-aware conversion** — done only by the F1 reader at the read boundary (spec §2); in the archive the time stays naive.
- **`price_view = raw_usd_view`** — the semantic name of the input price view from the contract (spec §2/§7); one value per dataset (manifest), guarantees a repeatable result.
- **NaN/Inf** — 0 in Output B apart from documented cases (spec §8).
